title: Skyfire Embers
description:
Hold fast! In Skyfire Embers you fly and shoot your way through medieval dragon invested levels atop your trusty dragon Junior as you search for your shared father. Are you brave enough to take down the enemies, even if it means confronting your own blood?

Description:

-Dodge enemy dragons and their relentless fire!

-Shoot dragons to get points and be at the top of the leaderboard!

-Waves of angry enemies try to block you from reaching the dragonlord. 

-Fight your way to the end to face the boss battle!

The game is made up of 2 handcrafted levels, each with a multi-stage bossfight
description_short: Skyfire embers is an explosive dragon adventure seeking its final resolution. Dodge, weave and fire your way through challenging bullet patterns in this hand-animated shoot ‘em up!
